arts.ttl: EFL Preview: Burnley and Leeds hope to clinch promotion
arts.sum: The second part of an Easter weekend double bill could answer a few big questions, with both Burnley and Leeds hoping to book Premier League returns.

arts.ttl: Leeds United predicted XI to face Stoke City
arts.sum: Leeds United v Stoke City predictions Leeds United host Stoke City on Easter Monday with Premier League football within reach, five clear with only nine points left to play for.

arts.ttl: Leeds star makes feelings clear on future, might have played his last game for them
arts.sum: Leeds United goalkeeper Illan Meslier has been linked with a move away from the club at the end of the season. The 25-year-old French goalkeeper has fallen down the pecking order on the back of his disappointing performances, and Karl Darlow is currently the first-choice goalkeeper for the Championship outfit. According to a report from […] The post Leeds star makes feelings clear on future, might have played his last game for them appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Leeds United transfer decision on three defenders show scale of summer task
arts.sum: Which Leeds United players could, should and would play in a potential Premier League season next term have very different answers. Having had Premier League experience with Sheffield United, and having shown his talent against most wingers in this division, it might be one starting XI area Leeds can afford to leave be.

arts.ttl: Leeds United handed transfer opportunity as fanciful Liverpool deal unlikely
arts.sum: Now, there is a suggestion Leeds could get Johnstone for a figure in the region of just under £10m, which while still a significant outlay, would represent good value for an experienced Premier League player who at 32-years-old still has a long shelf life left as a goalkeeper. However, talk of Nick Pope, James Trafford and Caoimhin Kelleher feels very wide of the mark, both in terms of the ambitions of someone like Kelleher who wants to be playing European football if possible, and the money that would be needed both to sign some others and in terms of wages.

arts.ttl: Leeds United player on radar of Crewe Alexandra
arts.sum: Leeds United defender Kris Moore has emerged on the radar of Crewe Alexandra, according to journalist Alan Nixon… The post Leeds United player on radar of Crewe Alexandra appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Leeds United set sights on Premier League goalkeeper
arts.sum: Leeds United are interested in Wolves goalkeeper Sam Johnstone, according to journalist Alan Nixon on his Patreon page.… The post Leeds United set sights on Premier League goalkeeper appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Leeds United have already pulled off transfer masterstroke ahead of summer window
arts.sum: Sky Sports pundit Don Goodman told Football League World: “I think if you’re a Championship club, and at the moment Leeds still are, and you can get £7.7 million for a player that hasn’t been a part of your plans and who’s not likely to be part of your plans then it’s a great deal. High-flying Bundesliga club Eintracht Frankfurt, who were dumped out of the Europa League by Tottenham Hotspur on Thursday evening, have signed Kristensen on a permanent basis for a fee thought to be in the region of £7.7m .

arts.ttl: Stoke City badge change: next stage and design process explained
arts.sum: More than 5,000 Stoke City supporters have joined in consultation about potential changes to the club badge – and given a clear steer about what they want and don’t want in any new design. A total 81 per cent of fans who took part in initial surveys said they were open to the idea of a new badge in the first major review of the crest that was introduced back in 2001.

arts.ttl: Leeds United: 3 free agents 49ers must consider
arts.sum: Leeds United have three games left in the Championship with automatic promotion in their hands, and with that there is speculation around how the club might tackle the upcoming summer window. Atalanta midfielder Mario Pasalic’s contract is due to expire in the summer at the age of 30, and even though his previous stint in England was a failure at Chelsea, not playing a single league game, he’s gone from strength to strength in Italy.
